description_long: This is a standard Coca-Cola can with a cylindrical aluminum body and a pull-tab top. The can is predominantly red with white Coca-Cola branding in a flowing script, accented by yellow and white swooshes and small water droplet graphics to suggest coldness. The front features the iconic Coca-Cola logo, while the back displays nutritional information, barcodes, and additional branding details. The top of the can is metallic silver with a circular pull-tab for opening. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with no visible dents or scratches. The can is typical of those found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or vending machines.
description: A red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and glossy finish, featuring detailed logos and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo and decorative swooshes on a red background.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view still dominated by the Coca-Cola logo, with more of the yellow and white swoosh visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and smaller 'Coke' branding on the red can.
description_view_3: Side-back view with more nutritional text and the barcode, less of the main logo visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Coca-Cola logo in white script, nutritional information, barcode, and 'Coke' branding in white on a red background with yellow and white swooshes.
